name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 new Loop is here!!Many girls who like BV must have owned this Loop bag before, simple appearance, classic weave, small and lightweight shape. This innovation continues the "camera bag" silhouette. Unlike the traditional Loop which can only be worn crossbody, this new version can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, satisfying both styling and daily needs. The large ring buckle allows the bag to be folded for use or used as a handle. The summer heat ☀️ usually lowers people's desire, but a lightweight bag greatly enhances the happiness of traveling 🫧
